## Description
## Type of Change
- [ ] New Feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Bug Fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] Refactor (code improvement, no functional changes)
- [ ] Architecture / Infrastructure (DI, Gradle, Navigation)
- [ ] Testing (Unit or UI tests)

## Architectural Changes
- [ ] Data Layer: (API, Database, Repository Implementation)
- [ ] Domain Layer: (Models, Repository Interfaces, Use Cases)
- [ ] UI Layer: (Composables, ViewModels, Navigation)

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented on my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] I have updated the libs.versions.toml if any new dependencies were added.
- [ ] Unit tests pass with my changes.
